Container.Name: HELFINANCE
Container.Overview: HELFINANCE is a self-hosted, privacy-first personal finance dashboard. All data stays on your server in a local SQLite database — no cloud, no subscriptions.[br][br] [b]Features:[/b][br] [b]Dashboard[/b] — Health Score (0-100), budget traffic light (green/yellow/red), free money this month, upcoming bookings[br] [b]Bookings[/b] — Manage recurring income and expenses with monthly, quarterly, semi-annual or yearly intervals; schedule future amount changes; budget limits per category[br] [b]Loans[/b] — Annuity loan calculator with full amortization table, extra payments support and avalanche payoff hints[br] [b]Savings[/b] — Track savings account balance with deposits and withdrawals, 12-month projection chart, irregular expense reserve calculator and emergency fund recommendation[br] [b]Reports[/b] — Monthly breakdown with category donut chart; yearly 12-column summary table; PDF and CSV export[br] [b]Admin Panel[/b] — SMTP email notifications, OIDC single sign-on (Authentik, Keycloak), user management, registration control, default language and currency[br] [b]PWA[/b] — Installable on desktop and mobile, works offline[br] [b]i18n[/b] — German (default) and English, per-user language preference[br] [b]Dark/Light Mode[/b] — Manual toggle[br][br] [b]Documentation:[/b] https://github.com/Kreuzbube88/helfinance/tree/main/docs

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the HELFINANCE web interface

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Required: random secret for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: DATABASE_PATH
Config.Description: Path to SQLite database file inside the container

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal port (should match the port mapping above)
